module.name: shipping
module.spec: CalculateShipping computes a flat shipping rate of $5.00 per item plus $0.50 per unit of quantity. There are no category-based rate adjustments — the rate is the same regardless of item type. The total is quantity * 0.50 + 5.00 per line item, summed across all items in the order. See order creation.
EstimateDelivery returns an estimated delivery date of 5 business days from today. Weekends are not counted. Holidays are not considered. See order fulfillment.
TrackShipment returns a status string for a given order ID. Status is one of: "pending", "shipped", "in_transit", "delivered". If the order ID is not found, returns "unknown".
